title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Summer Photography Day
questions.text: Spend a day taking photos by the river with a local photographer. Cameras can be borrowed if booked in advance. Participants should bring lunch, as the group will not return to town until late afternoon.
questions.question: What should participants know?

options.A: They need to arrange some equipment early.
options.B: They will have lunch in town together.
options.C: They must own a camera to attend.

questions.explanation: Cameras can be borrowed if they are booked in advance.

questions.heading: Message from Poppy to Dan
questions.text: Dan, I’ve saved you a seat near the front, but the room is filling up quickly. If you arrive after the talk starts, you may have to sit at the back.
questions.question: Why is Poppy texting Dan?

options.A: To warn him not to arrive too late.
options.B: To ask him to save her a seat.
options.C: To say the talk has already ended.

questions.explanation: Poppy says the room is filling and late arrival may mean sitting at the back.

questions.heading: Art Gallery Visitors
questions.text: You may take photographs in the entrance hall, but not inside the exhibition rooms. Sketching is allowed everywhere if you use pencils only. Please leave large bags at the desk.
questions.question: What does the notice say?

options.A: Different activities are allowed in different areas.
options.B: Photography is allowed in all exhibition rooms.
options.C: Visitors must leave pencils at the desk.

questions.explanation: Photos are limited to the entrance hall, while sketching has rules too.

questions.heading: From: Mum / Subject: Dinner
questions.text: I’ll be home later than usual, so please put the pasta in the oven at six. Don’t turn it on before then, or it will be dry when we eat after football practice.
questions.question: What does Mum want the reader to do?

options.A: Start cooking at the right time.
options.B: Eat dinner before football practice starts.
options.C: Buy pasta on the way home.

questions.explanation: Mum says when to put the pasta in the oven.

questions.heading: School Environment Team
questions.text: The environment team is looking for students to help reduce waste at school. Members will check recycling bins once a week and design posters reminding students to use them correctly.
questions.question: What will team members do?

options.A: Encourage other students to recycle properly.
options.B: Empty all school bins every day.
options.C: Stop students from designing recycling posters.

questions.explanation: Members check recycling bins and design reminder posters.
